product_description: Lexia® Core5® Reading is a technology-based, personalized reading program designed for students in PreK through 5th grade. It provides explicit and systematic instruction in six areas of reading, leveraging an adaptive blended learning model to deliver differentiated literacy instruction and accelerate skill development for all students.

ai_insights: Lexia Core5 Reading demonstrates a strong commitment to accessibility, integrating it into its product development lifecycle and actively aligning with WCAG 2.0 and 2.1 A and AA criteria. A recent conformance report details its support levels, noting full or partial support across various criteria such as use of color, audio control, and image alternatives. Identified areas needing improvement include full keyboard operability, text resizing without assistive technology, and consistent focus visibility. The program continuously releases updates to enhance accessibility features like keyboard navigation, color contrast, and sensory characteristics. It also offers native language support, audio support, and visual aids to support diverse learning needs and differentiated instruction. This comprehensive approach aims to provide customized learning opportunities and improve accessibility for all students within an an inclusive learning environment.
